title: Find 1 more or 1 less than a number
description: Practice finding one more or one less than a number.
topic_path: Find 1 more or 1 less than a number

assessment_items.question_content:
Mia had $4$ horses. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/e5c07f1f1cfbd0b48d55e61f2ee19b2e.png)

She got $1$ more horse.

**Now she has $\_\_\_\_$ horses.**






[[☃ radio 1]]

Alek saw $11$ sharks. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/47cf30435c4424eebc580fc54b51a61e.png)

Then he saw $1$ more shark.

**Alek saw $\_\_\_\_$ sharks.**






[[☃ radio 1]]

Lee had $12$ bananas. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/99b65b970118aa64a080d745d01ae81d.png)

She got $1$ more banana.

**Now she has $\_\_\_\_$ bananas.**






[[☃ radio 1]]

There were  $9$ elephants. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/cdb0b31c7620a0556402fe9d6a8b314b.png)    

One elephant ran away.   

**How many elephants are left?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Amy saw $17$ squirrels. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7fc59e3a0c86c7f02371e3b00800c650.png)    

One squirrel ran away.

**How many squirrels are left?**




[[☃ radio 1]]

There were $3$ foxes. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/3f4160d6b3bc129fa726ba389f2a951c.png)   

One fox ran away.  
 
**How many foxes are left?**




[[☃ radio 1]]

The zoo had the monkeys shown below. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/522a292915416446d14ff15b3412eddb.png)

The zoo got $1$ more monkey.

**Now there are  $\_\_\_\_$ monkeys at the zoo.**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
The zoo had $7$ monkeys.

The zoo got $1$ more monkey.
There are $8$ monkeys at the zoo.

assessment_items.question_content:
Carl picked the flowers shown below. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/74c62c077b6b2d015da274f37c9caa2e0333c19b)

He picked $1$ more flower.

**Now he has $\_\_\_\_$ flowers.**






[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Carl picked $3$ flowers.

He picked $1$ more.

assessment_items.question_content:
Rob had the ladybugs shown below. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/b11f737d7c534e06c36c79486e4b118c.png)

He found $1$ more ladybug.

**Now he has $\_\_\_\_$ ladybugs.**






[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Rob had $9$ ladybugs. 


He found $1$ more ladybug.

assessment_items.question_content:
Anne had the apples shown below. 

![](${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/1e98504092600b5c619e5f8e77a66235.png)    

Her sister ate one.  

**How many apples are left?**




[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Anne had $19$ apples. 
    

Her sister ate one.

assessment_items.question_content:
The cows shown below were in a field. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/d377826131e7abbc6b0d3512baea68e4d018950d)

One cow went into the barn.

**Now $\_\_\_\_$ cows are in the field.**






[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
There were $6$ cows in the field. 



One cow went into the barn.
Now, there are $5$ cows in the field.

assessment_items.question_content:
Levi saw the chicks shown below. 

![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c09d9bd2aa5e7de9e7aa2fb5e1234fa1f30224e6)    

One chick ran away. 

**How many chicks are left?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
Levi saw $14$ chicks. 


One chick ran away.

assessment_items.question_content:
Nate saw $12$ whales. 

One whale swam away. 

**How many whales are left?**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Bella saw $16$ acorns. 

  

One acorn rolled away.

**How many acorns are left?**




[[☃ radio 1]]

The zoo had $1$ penguin. 



The zoo got $1$ more penguin.

**Now there are  $\_\_\_\_$ penguins at the zoo.**






[[☃ radio 1]]
hints:
![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/aeaa00ec9f8caac5918794d17f0ade6e7f94f7d4)![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/f9e9fa48eab4a20333a68d189c85c221329782d3)
There are $2$ penguins at the zoo.

assessment_items.question_content:
Paul had $15$ mice.  

He got $1$ more mouse.

**Now he has $\_\_\_\_$ mice.**

[[☃ radio 1]]

Fred fed $10$ squirrels. 

Then he fed $1$ more squirrel.

**Fred fed $\_\_\_\_$ squirrels.**






[[☃ radio 1]]

Leo saw $5$ turtles.  

One turtle swam away.

**How many turtles are left?**




[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: ![5 turtles. The 5th turtle has a black X on it.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/04852260872dab3adab4fce09625c3c212e6eb9a)

assessment_items.question_content:
Bunny had $8$ carrots.  

She ate one.

**How many carrots are left?**




[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: ![8 carrots. The eighth carrot has a black X on it.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/4178dde873ea89874b69651afb484b9bf52b9637)

assessment_items.question_content:
Spot had $11$ bones.  

He ate one.

**How many bones are left?**




[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: ![11 bones. The eleventh bone has a black X on it.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/6e74c41c1874a86d9beaa718106b7ce276ac22c4)

assessment_items.question_content:
The aquarium had $14$ seals.  

They got $1$ more seal.

**How many seals does the aquarium have now?**




[[☃ radio 1]]

Ling grilled $2$ hot dogs. 

She grilled $1$ more hot dog.      

**How many hot dogs did Ling grill?**

[[☃ radio 1]]
hints: ![2 hot dogs plus 1 more hot dog.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/ebdb321888d62df5779fa94fe4485ca56ee62e4d)![](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/c2f12d17b3d5f1664b2a3a3006279b3d774057bc)

Ling grilled $3$ hot dogs.  

![3 hot dogs.](web+graphie:${☣ LOCALPATH}/images/7f0fea1d3d3c3333068278d567f6f397e69d206c)
